2603.25247.title: FEAST: Fully Connected Expressive Attention for Spatial Transcriptomics
2603.25247.paper_summary: Spatial Transcriptomics (ST) provides spatially-resolved gene expression, offering crucial insights into tissue architecture and complex diseases. However, its prohibitive cost limits widespread adoption, leading to significant attention on inferring spatial gene expression from readily available whole slide images. While graph neural networks have been proposed to model interactions between tissue regions, their reliance on pre-defined sparse graphs prevents them from considering potentially interacting spot pairs, resulting in a structural limitation in capturing complex biological relationships. To address this, we propose FEAST (Fully connected Expressive Attention for Spatial Transcriptomics), an attention-based framework that models the tissue as a fully connected graph, enabling the consideration of all pairwise interactions. To better reflect biological interactions, we introduce negative-aware attention, which models both excitatory and inhibitory interactions, capturing essential negative relationships that standard attention often overlooks. Furthermore, to mitigate the information loss from truncated or ignored context in standard spot image extraction, we introduce an off-grid sampling strategy that gathers additional images from intermediate regions, allowing the model to capture a richer morphological context. Experiments on public ST datasets show that FEAST surpasses state-of-the-art methods in gene expression prediction while providing biologically plausible attention maps that clarify positive and negative interactions. Our code is available at https://github.com/starforTJ/ FEAST.
2603.25247.paper_summary_zh: 空間轉錄組學（ST）提供了空間解析的基因表達，對於組織結構和複雜疾病提供了關鍵的見解。<lb/>然而，其高昂的成本限制了其廣泛應用，導致人們對從現成的全片影像推斷空間基因表達的研究受到重視。<lb/>雖然已經提出了圖神經網絡來建模組織區域之間的互動，但它們對預定義稀疏圖的依賴使其無法考慮潛在的互動點對，導致在捕捉複雜生物關係方面存在結構性限制。<lb/>為了解決這個問題，我們提出了FEAST（全連接表達注意力的空間轉錄組學），這是一個基於注意力的框架，將組織建模為一個全連接的圖，從而使所有成對互動都能被考慮。<lb/>為了更好地反映生物互動，我們引入了負向感知注意力，該注意力模型同時考慮興奮性和抑制性互動，捕捉標準注意力經常忽略的關鍵負向關係。<lb/>此外，為了減輕標準點影像提取中由於截斷或忽略上下文而造成的信息損失，我們引入了一種離網格取樣策略，從中間區域收集額外影像，使模型能夠捕捉更豐富的形態學上下文。<lb/>在公共ST數據集上的實驗顯示，FEAST在基因表達預測方面超越了最先進的方法，同時提供了生物學上合理的注意力圖，澄清了正向和負向互動。我們的代碼可在 https://github.com/starforTJ/ FEAST 獲得。
2603.25247.author: Taejin Jeong et.al.
2603.25247.authors: Taejin Jeong, Joohyeok Kim, Jinyeong Kim, Chanyoung Kim, Seong Jae Hwang
